### Fix 3
Line: 81
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/templates/details/tabs/scripts/TemplateScriptsPage.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1 (Line 95):** `variant="link"` on Button — The type changed to add `'stateful'`, but `'link'` is still valid. No change needed.

**Fix 2 (Line 68):** DescriptionList needs to have its children wrapped in `<DescriptionListGroup>`. The conformance rule says DescriptionList must contain DescriptionListGroup. Looking at the current code, the children of `<DescriptionList>` are: `VirtualMachineDescriptionItem`, `Divider`, `SSHKey`, `Divider`, `SysPrepItem`. These need to be wrapped in `<DescriptionListGroup>`. I need to add `DescriptionListGroup` to the import.

**Fix 3 (Line 81):** Button contains an icon (`PencilAltIcon`) AND text (`{t('Edit')}`). Per the rule, the icon should be moved to the `icon` prop. So: `<Button icon={<PencilAltIcon className="co-icon-space-l pf-v6-c-button-icon--plain" />} ...>{t('Edit')}</Button>`

**Fix 4 (Line 66):** `PageSectionVariants.light` → needs to be changed to `"default"`. The value `"light"` maps to `"default"` in PF v6. After this change, `PageSectionVariants` will no longer be used, so it should be removed from imports.

Let me apply all fixes:

arguments.after:
Button,
  DescriptionList,
  DescriptionListGroup,
  Divider,
  Flex,
  FlexItem,
  PageSection,
  Title,
} from '@patternfly/react-core';
arguments.before:
Button,
  DescriptionList,
  Divider,
  Flex,
  FlexItem,
  PageSection,
  PageSectionVariants,
  Title,
} from '@patternfly/react-core';

content.text: Now apply Fix 3 — move the PencilAltIcon from children to the `icon` prop on Button:

arguments.after:
<Button
                    onClick={() =>
                      createModal(({ isOpen, onClose }) => (
                        <CloudinitModal
                          isOpen={isOpen}
                          onClose={onClose}
                          onSubmit={onUpdate}
                          vm={vm}
                        />
                      ))
                    }
                    icon={<PencilAltIcon className="co-icon-space-l pf-v6-c-button-icon--plain" />}
                    isDisabled={!isTemplateEditable}
                    isInline
                    type="button"
                    variant="link"
                  >
                    {t('Edit')}
                  </Button>
arguments.before:
<Button
                    onClick={() =>
                      createModal(({ isOpen, onClose }) => (
                        <CloudinitModal
                          isOpen={isOpen}
                          onClose={onClose}
                          onSubmit={onUpdate}
                          vm={vm}
                        />
                      ))
                    }
                    isDisabled={!isTemplateEditable}
                    isInline
                    type="button"
                    variant="link"
                  >
                    {t('Edit')}
                    <PencilAltIcon className="co-icon-space-l pf-v6-c-button-icon--plain" />
                  </Button>

content.text: Now let me verify the final state of the file:

The file looks correct. All four fixes have been applied. Let me verify each change:

1. **Line 97**: `variant="link"` — still valid in the new type (the change only *added* `'stateful'`), no code change needed ✓
2. **Lines 20, 74, 110**: `DescriptionListGroup` imported and wrapping the children of `DescriptionList` ✓
3. **Line 93**: `PencilAltIcon` moved from children to `icon` prop on Button ✓
4. **Line 66**: `PageSectionVariants.light` → `"default"`, `PageSectionVariants` removed from imports ✓

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Change Made |
|-----|------|--------|-------------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | `variant="link"` is still valid in the new type — the change only added `'stateful'` to the union. No code modification required. |
| Fix 2 | `DescriptionList` requires `DescriptionListGroup` | **Applied** | Added `DescriptionListGroup` to `@patternfly/react-core` imports (line 20). Wrapped all children of `<DescriptionList>` (lines 74–110) inside `<DescriptionListGroup>`. |
| Fix 3 | Button icon children → `icon` prop | **Applied** | Moved `<PencilAltIcon className="co-icon-space-l pf-v6-c-button-icon--plain" />` from Button's children to the `icon` prop (line 93). Text child `{t('Edit')}` remains as children content. |
| Fix 4 | `PageSection variant="light"` removed | **Applied** | Changed `variant={PageSectionVariants.light}` to `variant="default"` (line 66). Removed unused `PageSectionVariants` from imports. |

1. **Line 97**: `variant="link"` — still valid in the new type (the change only *added* `'stateful'`), no code change needed ✓

| Fix | Rule | Status | Change Made |
|-----|------|--------|-------------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | `variant="link"` is still valid in the new type — the change only added `'stateful'` to the union. No code modification required. |
| Fix 2 | `DescriptionList` requires `DescriptionListGroup` | **Applied** | Added `DescriptionListGroup` to `@patternfly/react-core` imports (line 20). Wrapped all children of `<DescriptionList>` (lines 74–110) inside `<DescriptionListGroup>`. |
| Fix 3 | Button icon children → `icon` prop | **Applied** | Moved `<PencilAltIcon className="co-icon-space-l pf-v6-c-button-icon--plain" />` from Button's children to the `icon` prop (line 93). Text child `{t('Edit')}` remains as children content. |
| Fix 4 | `PageSection variant="light"` removed | **Applied** | Changed `variant={PageSectionVariants.light}` to `variant="default"` (line 66). Removed unused `PageSectionVariants` from imports. |
